query:
SELECT ag.id, ag.name as kpi_name, ag.owner, ag.targetValue, ag.unit, so.name as objective_name, so.weight as objective_weight
FROM annualGoals ag
LEFT JOIN strategicObjectives so ON ag.strategicObjective = so.name
ORDER BY so.name, ag.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2WVoNFXx8YRPBD4.root --database JzcMSgtkjzvCc45KUk33Lc --execute SELECT ag.id, ag.name as kpi_name, ag.owner, ag.targetValue, ag.unit, so.name as objective_name, so.weight as objective_weight
FROM annualGoals ag
LEFT JOIN strategicObjectives so ON ag.strategicObjective = so.name
ORDER BY so.name, ag.name;
